statusLegend.covered: Current OpenAPI has the required operation shape.
statusLegend.derived: The screen can be composed from current operations; server-side aggregation semantics must be fixed before integration.
statusLegend.partial: At least one frozen screen read or command has no complete current operation.
statusLegend.excluded: Demo-only or separately proposed scope; it must not call the production v1 API.

screens.gap: No dedicated dashboard summary; totals and pending counts must be derived server-side from the same scoped queries.
RFID read and assignment operations are missing; only blocking is defined.
Worker RFID read/assignment is not represented by an operation.
The response does not define authoritative leave balance or conflict/capacity summaries.
Annual balance, calendar aggregation and department capacity are not defined.
Frontend demonstration and MVP Scope v1.1 proposal only.
The frozen screen reads report_preview, but no preview operation/schema exists.
Terminal sync-event history has no read operation; deviceSignature remains an HMAC/mTLS decision gate.
Local simulator must never write production attendance or audit data.
Invitation acceptance/password setup and delivery contract are missing.
Department update/block is missing and holiday-calendar If-Match has no explicit aggregate revision field.

contractGatesBeforeLaterPhases: Version and approve invitation acceptance/password setup.
Version RFID read/assign operations used by the frozen worker screens.
Define leave balances, conflicts and department-capacity summaries.
Define report preview from the same query as export.
Define terminal sync-event read model and choose HMAC or mTLS.
Define department mutation and aggregate holiday-calendar revision semantics.
